name: Short-Cut Monkey Bread - La Times
recipeInstructions:
1. Unwrap the crescent roll packages and separate the triangles.
2. Dip each triangle in melted butter and place them overlapping in layers in an 8-inch ring mold, sprinkling each layer with Parmesan cheese if desired.
3. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk, about 1 hour.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Serve hot.
6 servings. Each serving: 429 calories; 743 mg sodium; 41 mg cholesterol; 31 grams fat; 29 grams carbohydrates; 5 grams protein; 0 fiber.
